title: WalletGuardPolicy
description: Policy schema for AGENTROPOLIS-PAYRAIL wallet guardrails. No agent gets raw wallet power.

agentId.description: The agent this policy governs. Use '*' for a global default.

maxSpendPerTaskUsdc.description: Maximum USDC allowed per individual task. Tasks above this limit are rejected.

maxSpendPerDayUsdc.description: Maximum USDC the agent may spend in a rolling 24-hour window.

approvalThresholdUsdc.description: Tasks at or above this amount require explicit human or supervisor-agent approval before settlement.

allowedDistricts.description: Districts this agent is permitted to bill. Use ['*'] to allow all districts not explicitly blocked.

blockedDistricts.description: Districts this agent is NEVER permitted to bill, regardless of other rules.

dryRun.description: When true, all payment flows are simulated — no real funds move. Always true in development.
